scaffolds.interfaces: pub struct Product { id: Uuid, name: String, category_id: Uuid }
scaffolds.function_signatures: pub async fn list_products(State(db): State<PgPool>) -> Result<Json<Vec<Product>>, AppError>

scaffolds.interfaces: type OpportunityService interface { CreateOpportunity(ctx, req) (*Opportunity, error) }
pub struct Invoice { id: Uuid, project_id: Uuid, total_cents: i64 }
scaffolds.function_signatures: pub async fn create_invoice(State(db): State<PgPool>, Json(req): Json<CreateInvoiceRequest>) -> Result<Json<Invoice>, AppError>
